Class RescorerQuery

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.query.RescorerQuery
public class RescorerQuery extends Object
Implementation of RescorerQuery to be used for rescoring filtered search results.
Since:
4.2
Author:
Peer Mueller
